sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99489" key="sunaraxno/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνᾰραχνόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n99489.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be covered as with a spider's web</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συναρθμόομαι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
